title: Headset version is changed
scenario: Verify that after a mobile user performs a DFU to upgrade the headset, the updated version is correctly reflected on the Lens tenant across the Inventory, Device profile, and Device user/Mobile user pages.
steps: 1. Perform a Device Firmware Update (DFU) on the mobile user's headset to upgrade it to a new version.
2. Log in to the Lens tenant.
3. Navigate to the Inventory page and check the headset version.
4. Navigate to the Device profile page and check the headset version.
5. Navigate to the Device user/Mobile user page and check the headset version.
expected: The updated headset version is correctly reflected on the Lens tenant across the Inventory page, Device profile page, and Device user/Mobile user page.
